title: Show vault status indicator in sidebar
implementation_notes: Create app/composables/useVaultStatus.ts — calls GET /api/settings with useFetch, exposes { resolvedRoot, isValid, shortPath }.
shortPath = last 2 path segments of resolvedRoot (e.g. 'Obsidian Vault') for display.
In default.vue, below the RelayHQ logo block in the sidebar, add a vault status chip:
- Green dot + shortPath when isValid is true.
- Red dot + 'Vault not found' + link to /settings when isValid is false.
Keep the chip compact — one line, small text, no disruption to existing nav.
If the fetch is loading, show a neutral grey dot with 'Connecting…'.
Do not add a full workspace selector dropdown in this subtask — that is post-Phase-1.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar shows the vault short path with a green dot when vault is valid.
Sidebar shows red dot + 'Vault not found' with a link to /settings when vault is invalid.
Clicking the chip or the settings link navigates to /settings.
No layout shift or overflow introduced in the sidebar.
Loading state does not flash for more than one paint cycle.
completion_summary: Added a sidebar vault-status chip and composable with compact loading, valid, and invalid states that point operators to settings.
